name: Deferred - Haunting - 1
description: First returns for ghosts, hauntings, and unresolved presences.

results.description: [defer haunting 2 1d6] Something from {origin} returned in the form of a presence too persistent to be dismissed as mood.
results.name: haunting-1

results.description: [defer haunting 2 1d6] A haunting first felt in {origin} resumed itself in voice, draft, dream, or repetition.
results.name: haunting-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer haunting 2 1d6] The old unease from {origin} returned with details memory should not have preserved.
results.name: haunting-1

results.description: [defer haunting 2 1d6] Whatever had attached itself to you in {origin} had not yet tired of your company or your fear.
results.name: haunting-1

results.description: [defer haunting 2 1d6] The memory, ghost, or guilty shape from {origin} found new ways to be present.
results.name: haunting-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer haunting 2 1d6] A haunting from {origin} returned often enough that coincidence became lazy explanation.
results.name: haunting-1

results.description: [defer haunting 2 1d6] What had followed you from {origin} ceased to be occasional and became expectant.
results.name: haunting-1

results.description: [defer haunting 2 1d6] Something tied to {sourceTitle} in {origin} returned with the intimacy of memory and the pressure of a presence.
results.name: haunting-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer haunting 2 1d6] The old presence from {origin} grew harder to explain away without sounding dishonest.
results.name: haunting-1

results.description: [defer haunting 2 1d6] The thing that had begun in {origin} returned not in terror but in persistence, which can be worse.
results.name: haunting-1

results.description: [defer haunting 2 1d6] A ghostly, guilty, or half-understood remainder from {origin} refused to remain behind you.
results.name: haunting-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer haunting 2 1d6] The haunting from {origin} had the discouraging habit of returning when you were almost well again.
results.name: haunting-1

results.description: [defer haunting 2 1d6] What you had taken from {origin}, or what it had taken from you, resumed the old conversation in the dark and without permission.
results.name: haunting-1

results.description: [defer haunting 2 1d6] The old haunting from {origin} became specific enough that fear gave way to grim familiarity.
results.name: haunting-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer haunting 2 1d6] The presence from {origin} lingered near your life long after others would have called it superstition.
results.name: haunting-1

results.description: [defer haunting 2 1d6] Whatever had haunted you since {origin} returned with enough clarity to threaten interpretation.
results.name: haunting-1
